summary: Tested PWA offline functionality - Service Worker registration, index.html caching, offline preload banner, and download functionality. All core tests passed.

service_worker_registration.details: SW v7 registered at scope https://sumup-style-kassa.preview.emergentagent.com/, state: activated

index_html_caching.details: facturatie-shell-v7 cache contains 4 items including /index.html and / - CRITICAL for offline refresh

offline_preload_banner.details: Banner 'Offline beschikbaar maken?' appears after ~5 seconds with 'Downloaden' and 'Later' buttons

offline_download_function.details: Click on 'Downloaden' triggers preload of 112 modules with 0 failures

cache_population.details: After download, facturatie-v7 cache contains 144 items (112 modules + 32 assets)

offline_indicator.details: localStorage flag 'offlinePreloadComplete' set to 'true' after download. Green 'Offline beschikbaar' indicator would show for returning users.

critical_code_review_comments: Service worker v7 implementation is solid with proper cache versioning
handleNavigation() correctly serves cached /index.html for offline navigation requests
preloadModules.js correctly loads all 112 modules in batches of 5
OfflinePreloadManager component correctly shows banner after 5 seconds and handles preload flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA offline functionality is working correctly. Service worker v7 properly caches index.html on install and serves it for offline navigation. The preload manager downloads all 112 modules successfully. All requested test cases passed.
